name: My Creativity Map
description: Students reflect on times they have been creative in different domains (school, home, nature).
learning_outcomes: Not find the idea of being creative intimidating by reflecting on past creativity

name: Active Listening
description: Discussion on what makes a good listener, which traits to keep and discard, analyse situations.
learning_outcomes: Develop the ability to listen with focus, understand others better, and respond thoughtfully

name: Math Sprint
description: 10-minute adaptive math practice across Number Sense, Fractions, and Geometry. Questions adapt to your level.
learning_outcomes: Build fluency across core math skills
Practice at the right difficulty level

name: Emotional Questions to AI
description: Write and ask emotional questions to AI to introduce AI reliability gently.
learning_outcomes: Introduces AI reliability gently

name: SPARK Companion — Product Ideation
description: Chat with SPARK companion on the idea they want to create.
learning_outcomes: Ideate on the project that they want to build further

name: Reverse-It
description: Students spin two wheels to get an object and a twist, then re-imagine how that object could work in a new way.
learning_outcomes: Develop flexible thinking by breaking the 'this is how it's supposed to be' mindset

name: Claim Builder
description: Learn how to make premises and conclusions logically using claims.
learning_outcomes: Learn how to build logical arguments and understand how strong reasoning works

name: Fact, Trick, or Opinion Quiz
description: Distinguish objective facts from opinions and misleading claims.
learning_outcomes: Learn to tell the difference between facts, opinions, and misleading information

name: If/Then Chains + Pattern Puzzles
description: Build a chain of logical consequences using If/Then reasoning and solve visual/numerical pattern puzzles.
learning_outcomes: Understand cause-and-effect relationships
Strengthen problem-solving skills by spotting patterns

name: Generate a Pattern Puzzle with AI
description: Use AI to create pattern puzzles while learning how clear prompts lead to better results.
learning_outcomes: Understand how prompts shape AI output

name: Product Card
description: Students use AI companion to answer 4 simple prompts about their product and turn it into a 1-page Product Card.
learning_outcomes: Practice turning a vague idea into a clear product concept

name: What Could This Be?
description: Students see different shapes and quickly imagine what each shape could become under a time limit.
learning_outcomes: Removes fear of 'wrong'. Shows ideas aren't linear.

name: Prompt Engineering
description: Cover what prompts are, quiz to make sure they understand, experiment how changes in prompts influence AI responses.
learning_outcomes: Develop the skill of giving clear, specific, and structured directions

name: Parrot, Paraphrase, Power-Up
description: One student speaks; the other practices active listening by repeating (parrot), rephrasing (paraphrase), then improving (power up).
learning_outcomes: Learn to understand before responding

name: Multiple Uses Game
description: Given everyday objects, come up with as many different uses as possible within a time limit.
learning_outcomes: Reduce fear of being 'wrong' in idea generation

name: AI Idea Round
description: Ask AI: 'Give 10 uses for a paper clip.' Compare: boring vs. original vs. impossible ideas.
learning_outcomes: AI is fast, can make mistakes, better instructions lead to better outcomes

name: Product Building — Idea Write-up
description: Write down your idea for the product you want to build.
learning_outcomes: Capture and organize product ideas

name: Reclassify Everything
description: Students group everyday objects based on unexpected or unusual traits.
learning_outcomes: Understand that categories depend on the rules we choose

name: If/Else Decision Trees
description: Build foundations for algorithmic thinking with If/Else decision trees.
learning_outcomes: Build foundations for algorithmic thinking

name: Generate If/Else Decision Trees
description: Practice turning ideas into logical decision flows.
learning_outcomes: Practice turning ideas into logical decision flows

name: Chain of Reasoning
description: Students map thinking steps that link a claim to a clear conclusion.
learning_outcomes: Practice explaining how we know something, not just what we think

name: Train a Classification Model
description: Understand that AI learns by being given examples and labels.
learning_outcomes: Understand that AI learns by being given examples and labels

name: My Product Decision Tree
description: Use logic rules to show how your product works or makes decisions.
learning_outcomes: Use logic rules to show how your product works or makes decisions

name: Riddle Remix
description: Explore different solutions to riddles.
learning_outcomes: Develop flexible thinking by exploring multiple possible answers

name: Introduction to User Research
description: Effective solutions are based on real user needs. Learn basic methods to gather insights about people's problems.
learning_outcomes: Understand that effective solutions are based on real user needs

name: User Interview Lab
description: Create 5 interview questions for a potential user of their product idea.
learning_outcomes: Develop skills in asking open-ended, insight-focused questions

name: You Can Only Pick Two Game
description: Choose 2 of 3: Cheap, Fast, High Quality. Understand that decisions involve trade-offs.
learning_outcomes: Understand that decisions involve trade-offs

name: AI as a Simulated User
description: Use AI as a simulated user — raise questions and solve problems.
learning_outcomes: Use AI to simulate user perspectives and refine solutions

name: Pain Point Ranking Challenge
description: List problems from user interviews, score each on frequency and impact, calculate priority score.
learning_outcomes: Analyze user research findings, evaluate problems based on frequency and impact

name: Creative Pattern Inventions
description: Students study real-world patterns and break them down into what repeats and what changes.
learning_outcomes: Develop skills in observing structure, not just details

name: Basics of Set Theory
description: Understand that sets are groups based on shared properties. Venn diagrams and overlapping categories.
learning_outcomes: Understand that sets are groups based on shared properties

name: Odd One Out — But Defend It
description: Show 4 items. Students choose the odd one out but must justify their logic.
learning_outcomes: Practice justifying answers using clear reasoning

name: Same Thing, Different Groups
description: Given one object, place it into 3 different categories and explain why each is correct.
learning_outcomes: Realize that multiple answers can be logically valid

name: Work on Product Pitch with AI
description: Use AI to perfect your product pitch.
learning_outcomes: Use AI to improve pitch clarity and impact

name: Objections & Overlap Slide
description: Improve their pitch through critical reflection on objections and overlaps.
learning_outcomes: Improve their pitch through critical reflection

name: Grid Logic Challenge
description: Students tackle puzzles with all information provided.
learning_outcomes: Strengthen attention to detail

name: Introduction to Logic Gates
description: Learn that systems (including AI and computers) work using conditions — AND, OR, NOT.
learning_outcomes: Learn that systems work using conditions

name: Precision Instructions
description: Giving instructions precisely to systems.
learning_outcomes: Learn how systems rely on precise input

name: Logic Gates Puzzles + Generator
description: Practice solving problems using structured logic. Experiment with how changing inputs changes results.
learning_outcomes: Practice solving problems using structured logic

name: Strategic Puzzles
description: Solve puzzles by comparing rules and predicting which gives the best chance of winning.
learning_outcomes: Compare different rule systems and their outcomes

name: Redesign Conversations
description: Turn ordinary small talk into interesting, curious questions.
learning_outcomes: Practice moving beyond surface-level communication

name: Social Deduction Mysteries + Navigating Conflict
description: Engage in activities requiring observation, inference, collaboration. Learn strategies for resolving disagreements.
learning_outcomes: Practice observation and inference
Learn strategies for resolving disagreements constructively

name: Team Tower + Point of View Carousel
description: Work in teams to explain what they've built. Practice articulating ideas and understanding multiple perspectives.
learning_outcomes: Build teamwork
Develop empathy by articulating opposing views

name: Upgrade Your AI Pitch
description: Students pitch their AI project, get feedback, and revise their pitch to make it stronger.
learning_outcomes: Use feedback to improve communication

name: Ad-Maker Challenge
description: AI generates slogans → students filter manipulative ones.
learning_outcomes: Develop awareness of ethical communication boundaries

name: Category Detective
description: Identify shared categories between items.
learning_outcomes: Categorisation

name: Introduction to Probability
description: Connect patterns to predicting outcomes. Introduce basic probability concepts.
learning_outcomes: Connect patterns to predicting outcomes

name: Probability Practice
description: Puzzles + interactive game to apply simple probability concepts.
learning_outcomes: Apply simple probability concepts to solve problems

name: AI, Classify This!
description: Prompt an AI system to group diverse items based on logical criteria and analyze the reasoning.
learning_outcomes: Practice giving AI clear logical classification rules

name: Product Pitch Deck
description: Students create a mini pitch (4-5 slides) about their product.
learning_outcomes: Students create a mini pitch about their product

name: Clarity Speed Round
description: Describe a simple object in 3 different ways (to a toddler, a scientist, and an alien).
learning_outcomes: Learn to adjust explanations based on audience knowledge level

name: Introduction to Persuasion
description: Learn that effective persuasion combines logic, clarity, and connection.
learning_outcomes: Learn that effective persuasion combines logic, clarity, and connection

name: One Idea, Many Voices + Build the Bridge
description: Express the same idea for different audiences and tones. Explain your project so anyone can understand.
learning_outcomes: Understand how tone changes meaning and impact
Practice explaining ideas in simple language

name: Persuasion Lab
description: Experiment with persuasive techniques like strong openings, benefits, and emotional appeal.
learning_outcomes: Experiment with persuasive techniques

name: AI Tone Transformer + AI Hook
description: Give AI a sentence to rewrite in different styles: persuasive, funny, emotional, formal. Analyze hooks.
learning_outcomes: Recognize communication is shaped by style, emotion, and intent

name: Poster Jam! — Project Poster
description: Design a poster for your project combining persuasion, clarity, and design.
learning_outcomes: Combine persuasion, clarity, and design

name: Prompt Wisdom Quiz
description: Identify common errors about prompting.
learning_outcomes: Identify common errors about prompting

name: AI Basics — Tool, Not Truth
description: Understand that AI is a tool, not a source of guaranteed truth. Spot misleading offers and data-safety risks.
learning_outcomes: Understand that AI is a tool, not a source of guaranteed truth

name: Prompting Like a Pro — CLEAR Framework
description: CLEAR Framework + One shot/Few shot prompt practice. Improve vague prompts into clear, structured ones.
learning_outcomes: Improve vague prompts into clear, structured ones

name: Hallucination Hunt
description: Students ask AI 3 questions (obvious, tricky, emotional). Tag answers: safe / unsure / dangerous.
learning_outcomes: Identify when AI responses may be unreliable

name: My Smart Prompt Card
description: Develop rules to follow when prompting AI.
learning_outcomes: Develop rules to follow when prompting AI

name: Say It Without Saying It
description: Students must communicate a message without using key words.
learning_outcomes: Develop precise communication skills under constraints

name: Game Theory Basics
description: Learn about rational decisions, dominant strategies, and Nash equilibrium intuitively.
learning_outcomes: Learn about rational decisions

name: Cognitive Biases
description: Understand why humans don't act rationally. Common cognitive biases.
learning_outcomes: Understand why humans don't act rationally

name: Agent Mission Briefing + Agent Planner
description: Examine well-crafted prompts, then design step-by-step plans for AI agents with tools, verification, and fallback.
learning_outcomes: Understand how structured prompts guide AI agent behavior
Learn to design AI workflows

name: The High-Stakes AI Decision Room
description: Act as a decision team using AI in time-sensitive scenarios where choices affect outcomes, bias can distort judgment.
learning_outcomes: Identify cognitive biases in AI-generated suggestions

name: My Decision Playbook
description: Internalize bias awareness in real-world contexts.
learning_outcomes: Internalize bias awareness in real-world contexts

name: Impossible Problem Challenge
description: Give kids a seemingly impossible problem and ask them to brainstorm for ideas.
learning_outcomes: Interpret and create graphs to represent relationships between variables

name: Demo Day Practice
description: Preparation, organization and time-management before an event.
learning_outcomes: Preparation, organization and time-management before an event

name: Scenario Agents — Reduce Mistakes
description: Revisit the agent planner activity and learn to reduce mistakes by designing clearer instructions.
learning_outcomes: Learn to reduce mistakes by designing clearer instructions

name: AI Dungeon Game
description: Students quickly see how different prompt inputs lead to very different narrative results.
learning_outcomes: Develop cause-and-effect awareness between instructions and AI responses

name: Future You Vision Board + Spot Misleading Offers
description: Create a vision board for what their project could look like. Spot misleading offers and data-safety risks.
learning_outcomes: Apply step-by-step logical thinking to improve clarity
Build early data and digital safety awareness

name: Demo Day Checklist
description: Test the technology, materials, and timing, preparing for a smooth and professional booth setup.
learning_outcomes: Apply organizational and planning skills

name: Project Pattern Map
description: Connect current project design to future possibilities through visual planning and reflection.
learning_outcomes: Connect current project design to future possibilities

name: Demo Day — The Showcase
description: Final showcase. Students present their projects from concept through to delivery.
learning_outcomes: Demonstrate end-to-end product delivery
Present and persuade effectively

name: Number Sense — Estimation & Mental Math
description: Quick mental math challenges, reasonable estimates, Fermi problems adapted for grade band.
learning_outcomes: Build number sense and confidence in thinking quickly

name: Estimation Sprint
description: Timed estimation challenges with increasing difficulty. Students estimate quantities, distances, and durations.
learning_outcomes: Develop quick estimation skills

name: Fraction Foundations
description: Fraction equivalence, comparing fractions, addition and subtraction of fractions with visual models.
learning_outcomes: Understand fraction equivalence and operations

name: Fraction Puzzles
description: Interactive fraction puzzles: pizza sharing, recipe scaling, and fraction wall challenges.
learning_outcomes: Apply fraction concepts to real-world scenarios

name: Decimals & Percentages
description: Converting between fractions, decimals, and percentages. Real-world percentage problems (discounts, tips).
learning_outcomes: Convert between forms and apply to real problems

name: Shopping Mall Challenge
description: Calculate discounts, compare prices, budget with percentages in a simulated shopping scenario.
learning_outcomes: Apply decimal and percentage reasoning to real scenarios

name: Ratios & Proportional Reasoning
description: Direct and inverse proportion. Scale drawings, recipe scaling, speed/distance/time.
learning_outcomes: Understand direct/inverse proportion and apply to real contexts

name: Scale It Up
description: Scale recipes, maps, and models. Solve speed/distance/time problems.
learning_outcomes: Apply proportional reasoning to practical problems

name: Algebraic Thinking
description: Variables, expressions, and simple equations. Pattern-to-formula translation.
learning_outcomes: Understand variables, expressions, and simple equations

name: Equation Escape Room
description: Solve equations to unlock clues in a puzzle-based escape room format.
learning_outcomes: Practice solving equations in an engaging format

name: Geometric Reasoning
description: Properties of shapes, spatial reasoning, area/perimeter, angles.
learning_outcomes: Understand properties of shapes, spatial reasoning, area/perimeter

name: Design a Floor Plan
description: Design a room floor plan using area and perimeter constraints. Calculate material needs.
learning_outcomes: Apply geometric reasoning to practical design

name: Variables & Functional Relationships
description: Input-output rules, function machines, generalization from patterns.
learning_outcomes: Understand input-output rules and can generalize

name: Function Machine Challenge
description: Discover the hidden rule in function machines. Create your own function machines for peers.
learning_outcomes: Practice identifying and creating functional relationships

name: Data Interpretation & Prediction
description: Reading graphs, identifying trends, making justified predictions from data.
learning_outcomes: Read graphs, identify trends, make justified predictions

name: Graph Detective
description: Analyze real-world graphs and datasets. Make predictions and identify misleading representations.
learning_outcomes: Analyze data critically and make predictions
